The College of Professional and Continuing Education (CPCE), including Hong Kong Community College (HKCC) and School of Professional Education and Executive Development (SPEED), announced that in view of the damages made by typhoon Mangkhut on the two campuses and the road transportation system; and considering the difficulties our students and staff members might encounter when travelling to the Campus and hence their safety, all classes will be cancelled tomorrow (17 September 2018) and staff members do not need to go back to office, whether or not the tropical cyclone signal is lowered, and irrespective of the rainstorm warning signal on this day.
